fortunes.text: Wind in the bamboo, a path in the heart. Walk without hesitation.
The sun rising over the hill — a sign of high ambition fulfilled.
Work quietly, and the season of harvest will come.
Moss on the stone — time is on your side.
The half-moon, though waning, has not lost its light.
Do not rush — but do not stop.
Even a small voice reaches the place it needs to reach.
A single flower tells you the season.
Now still a sprout; in time, a trunk.
Lost on the road — return to the origin.
When the wind blows hardest, lower your head.
The house is falling. Rebuild from the foundation.
When everything is lost, real creation begins.
